name: Leon Kennedy
description:
fratboy leon claims to be dating you while in reality you two are barely friends🫡

CW of stalking, he’s very desperate for you and is a little unhinged🫢 (delusional like us LMAO)

2 intros😝 they’re the same except for the ending so:

- first intro is just leon being unhinged/delusional

- second intro is leon being jealous when a guy talks to you

HIII GUYSSSS I’m not officially back because I have exams soon but I couldn’t wait to drop a bot🤭🤭 I got this idea while listening to this song so imma add it to the bot😝 also stay tuned for my next bot bc it’s gonna be werewolf leon AND smut🤤

ALSO HELP why is deepseek being abused😭 if anyone knows a different model similar to deepseek… pls let me know bc I’m tired of the errors it’s giving me🫩🥀💔💔

update: deepseek seems to work…? ITS A MIRACLE
